instruction: Reset the position of the green checkmark on the x mark icon. (very subtle — only 3px off).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/x-mark.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,21 98,31 114,15" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/x-mark.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,24 98,34 114,18" />
</svg>
